title: Contains Duplicate
description: Given an integer array `nums`, return `true` if any value appears at least twice in the array, and return `false` if every element is distinct.

examples.explanation: The number 1 appears twice in the array, hence the function should return `true`.
All elements are distinct in the array, so the function should return `false`.
The numbers 1 and 2 both appear more than once in the array, thus the function returns `true`.

constraints: The length of `nums` will be in the range `[0, 10^5]`.
Each element in `nums` will be an integer in the range `[-10^9, 10^9]`.
hints: Consider using a data structure that allows for fast lookups.
Think about how you can keep track of the elements you've seen so far.
What happens when you encounter a duplicate during your iteration?
Try to come up with a solution that runs in linear time.
